speaker: seller

args.message: Well hello there! You've got a great eye for quality – this 2017 Toyota Sienna XLE is a fantastic family vehicle, meticulously maintained and packed with premium features like leather seats and a rear entertainment system. It's got that legendary Toyota reliability and just had a fresh inspection, so it's ready for any adventure you can throw at it!

text: Oh, that sounds lovely! A recent inspection, you say? That's just wonderful. What did the inspection say, if you don't mind me asking?

args.message: The inspection was fantastic! Passed with flying colors, just as we expected with a Toyota. Our certified mechanic gave it a clean bill of health – said it’s running smooth as silk and has tons of life left in it. Honestly, it’s rare to see one this age in such pristine condition.
